decision_rationale: Only 1/8 (GaLore at func=0.70 borderline) hits; combined 4-component yurt structural decomposition (interlaced rank-1 lattice + arc-under-tension + shared hub + felt smoothing) appears as novel composition not jointly covered by any single prior art. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on basin loss landscape + low-rank gradient projection adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
